tech_lead.name: Tech Lead
tech_lead.gameEffect: +15% effective daily capacity for everyone whose board role is Developer. Stacking is summed per role type; the engine caps the global bonus per specialty.

scrum_master.name: Scrum Master
scrum_master.gameEffect: Lowers handoff rework chance for the whole team. Multiple Scrum Masters stack up to an engine cap.

setup.title: Match setup
setup.lede: Build the team, synergy matrix, and backlog. When you start, the configuration is frozen until you return to setup.
setup.classicTasksHint: Adds one card with a random title and per-stage effort from the technical task pool.

classicTasks.regexNfa: From regular expression to a small NFA subset

setup.taskKindMappingHint: Pick which board role (Analyst / Developer / Tester) is the specialist for each task type. On handoffs, if several assignees share the same stage role, the engine prefers the one that matches this mapping.
setup.tablePointsSumHint: Sum of the three stages (total card effort).
setup.tableStageWorkHint: Set work units per board stage; Σ is the sum. Older JSON that only has "Points" splits those values on load until you save new per-stage numbers.
setup.tableDueGlobalDayHint: Inclusive global day: deploy on or before this day avoids late penalty. Empty = no deadline.
setup.assigneeDragIntro: Assignees are not set on this screen. During the match, drag team members onto cards that have left the Backlog (you cannot assign people while a card is still in Backlog); once any cards are in Analysis or later, every member must appear on at least one such card before you can advance the day.
setup.hypothesisBody: Each member sets a daily delivery range (min–max); each working day an integer is drawn uniformly from that range. Only then multipliers apply: specialty column (~×2), then global job-role bonuses (e.g. Tech Lead). With no range set, the legacy 1…6 dice max applies. On Dev, cards with several assignees use average pairwise synergy between assignees. Handoffs use γ and pairwise synergy; low synergy raises rework; Scrum Master reduces handoff rework for everyone. On Daily and Sprint Review days, a random event may fire (sickness, vacation, etc.) according to the configured probability — see the list during the match. Each task can carry business value and a deadline (global day); at the end of the match the financial report sums net value with penalties for late or missed delivery.
setup.deliveryHint: Uniform draw per day in this range; specialist and job-role multipliers apply afterward (engine caps daily effective capacity).

memberSynergy.byPersonHint: Pairwise score with each teammate. Turn off Bi-dir. to edit directed synergy (you → teammate) on member cards; handoffs use only the sender’s view; collaboration uses the average of both directions.
memberSynergy.byRoleHint: Extra adjustment when working with anyone in that role (added to pair synergy; total clamped to −1…+1).
memberSynergy.needAnotherMember: Add another member to edit per-person synergy.

params.sprintScheduleLede: Choose how many days each sprint lasts and how many full cycles you play. Each step is one global day: day 1 is Planning; middle days are Daily plus board work; the last sprint day is Sprint Review (still with board work); then one retrospective step before the next sprint.
params.daysPerSprintHint: Between 3 and 30. First day of the sprint is Planning; last day is Sprint Review. Other days are Daily with capacity spent on the board.
params.numSprintsHint: How many full cycles you play (each ends with a retrospective day that still advances the global day counter).
params.sprintSummary: Global calendar preview: approximately {{totalSteps}} steps — {{numSprints}} sprints × ({{daysPerSprint}} sprint days + 1 retrospective day).
params.planningPullMaxHint: 0 = no automatic pull from Backlog to Analysis; drag Backlog → Analysis (then forward only). >0 = Planning and working days fill Analysis up to the WIP limit.

errors.assigneesMustBeDistinct: Card "{{title}}" cannot include the same person twice among assignees.
errors.cardOneAssignee: Card "{{title}}" needs at least one assignee.
errors.memberSingleActiveCard: {{name}} is already assigned to card "{{cardTitle}}" in active work. Each person can be on only one card at a time.

synergy.needTwoMembers: Add at least two members to edit synergy.
synergy.hint: Values between −1 (friction) and +1 (alignment). Used in collaboration on Dev and in handoffs between stages.
synergy.matrixSyncedWithMemberCards: The matrix below is the same per-person synergy as on each member card.
synergy.matrixAsymmetricHint: Non-bidirectional pair: edit values on member cards (me → teammate arrows).

kanban.idleNone: No one — everyone has a card past Backlog.
kanban.dragCardHint: Drag the ⋮⋮ handle on each card to change column.
kanban.assigneePoolSublabel: To remove someone from a card, drag their chip back into this dashed box.
kanban.assigneePoolEmpty: No one available here — everyone is already on active cards.
kanban.assigneeHowTitle: How to put people on cards
kanban.assigneeHowStep1: Click and hold a name in the Team box below, then drag.
kanban.assigneeHowStep2: Drop onto the dashed boxes under “Assignees” on a card (or “+ add”). You can put several people on the same card.
kanban.assigneeHowStep3: Backlog and Deploy are read-only for assignees here — set the team when the card is in Analysis, Development, or Testing.
kanban.dragAssigneeOff: Drag to Team area to remove

tooltip.title: {{name}} — estimated daily range on this card
tooltip.range: Estimated delivery on this card: [{{min}}, {{max}}] pts/day

cfd.title: Cumulative Flow Diagram (CFD)
cfd.empty: Run days to see the CFD.

financial.title: Financial outcome
financial.emptyHint: Set business value on cards in setup to see this report.

chartHint.perCard: Gray bars: full value if on time; colored bars: net after deadlines and penalties.
chartHint.cumulative: Sum of net from deploys per day; on the last day, losses from undelivered tasks are included.
chartHint.statusPie: Count of tasks with value > 0 in each final state.

financial.pieEmpty: No data for the pie chart.

play.title: Match
play.calendarHint: Advance one day to start the calendar.
play.kanbanAssigneesHint: Assignees: drag from Team onto a card slot or the "+ add" slot; drag a chip back to Team to remove. Add as many assignees as you need. Read-only in Backlog and Deploy.
play.kanbanDragCardsHint: Cards: drag ⋮⋮ forward only — Backlog → Analysis → Development → Testing → Deploy. In Analysis, Development, and Testing you may move to the next column only when stage remaining is zero; WIP limits apply.
play.manualMoveWipFull: Cannot add more cards to "{{col}}": WIP limit is {{wip}}.
play.manualMoveStageIncomplete: Finish the work in this stage (remaining down to zero) before dragging the card to the next column.
play.manualMoveNotAllowed: That column move is not allowed (forward flow only).
play.manualMoveFromDeploy: Cards in Deploy cannot be moved.
play.assigneeReadOnlyBacklog: You cannot assign owners to "{{title}}" in the Backlog — move the card to Analysis (or later) and set the team there.
play.assigneeReadOnlyDeploy: Cannot change assignees in Deploy for "{{title}}".
play.assigneeUnknownCard: Card not found on the board.
play.allocationBlocked: Cannot advance the day: these members are not assignees on any card outside the Backlog: {{names}}.
play.allocationBlockedHint: Assign each person to at least one card that has left the Backlog (Analysis, Dev, Test, or Deploy) before continuing.
play.overbookedBlocked: Cannot advance: these members are assigned to more than one active card (Analysis/Dev/Testing): {{names}}.
play.overbookedBlockedHint: Remove each person from extra cards so every member is on only one active card at a time.
play.unassignedActiveCards: Cards in active columns without any assignee receive no capacity today: {{titles}}.
play.unassignedActiveCardsHint: Drag people onto cards in Analysis, Dev or Test before advancing the day.
play.workAnimMember: {{name}} delivers {{delivered}} points in this step (effective capacity: {{cap}}).

dayModal.title: Day summary
dayModal.capacityMultFootnote: Multiplier order: base draw → specialty-column multiplier (~×2) → global job roles (e.g. Tech Lead) → daily random event (if it changes capacity). "Δ vs roll" is effective capacity minus the base roll.
dayModal.workByTaskIntro: Points = story/work units applied to the card today (sum of steps where that person spent capacity on that task).
dayModal.noWorkDeliveries: No capacity was applied to cards today (or no consumption was recorded).

dailyEvents.catalogIntro: On Daily Scrum and Sprint Review days, with the probability set in setup, one event per day may occur. It applies to effective capacity after the base roll, specialist multiplier, and job-role bonuses.

member_sick.name: Sick team member
member_sick.effect: Effective capacity for the drawn member is 0 for the day (no delivery points).

member_vacation.name: Vacation / absence
member_vacation.effect: Effective capacity for the drawn member is 0 (planned absence).

member_half_day.name: Half day
member_half_day.effect: Effective capacity for the drawn member is multiplied by 0.5.

infrastructure_outage.name: Infrastructure incident
infrastructure_outage.effect: Everyone: effective capacity ×0.78 (CI, VPN, or unstable environment).

good_vibes_break.name: Good mood / productive break
good_vibes_break.effect: Everyone: effective capacity ×1.12 (capped by the engine's daily ceiling).

engine.sprintReviewDay: Sprint Review: last working day of the sprint.
engine.retroNarrative: Retrospective: team reflection (no mechanical effect in v1).
engine.dailyEventMemberSick: Event: {{memberName}} is sick — no capacity today.
engine.dailyEventMemberVacation: Event: {{memberName}} away (vacation or similar) — no capacity today.
engine.dailyEventMemberHalfDay: Event: {{memberName}} on a half day — reduced capacity.
engine.dailyEventTeamMeeting: Event: meeting-heavy day — team capacity reduced.
engine.dailyEventOutage: Event: infrastructure incident — team capacity reduced.
engine.dailyEventGoodVibes: Event: good vibes — small capacity boost for everyone.

about.title: About the model
about.lede: Formulas and numeric rules used by the simulation engine (see `src/simulation/`). Rounding and caps match the TypeScript implementation.

points.title: Story points split across stages
points.body: Each card with P story points splits work into Analysis, Dev, and Test before the simulation runs.
points.formula:
w_a = max(1, round(0.3·P))
w_d = max(1, round(0.5·P))
w_t = P − w_a − w_d

(code adjusts so w_t ≥ 1 and the three sum to P.)

dailyCapacity.title: Per-member daily capacity
dailyCapacity.body: A uniform integer draw for base delivery, then specialist multiplier (if that member’s column has work), global job-role bonus for that specialty, then the daily random-event multiplier.
dailyCapacity.formula1:
N_fallback = clamp(6 + diceMaxDelta, 2, 8)
[L, U] = rounded deliveryMin/Max clamped to [1, 30], L ≤ U
B ~ uniform integer on [L, U]
dailyCapacity.formula2:
E = clamp(2 + specialistBonusDelta, 1.25, 3.5)
C₁ = min(48, round(B · E))   (only in the member’s specialty column, if any card has remaining work)
dailyCapacity.formula3:
g = min(0.75, Σ job-role bonuses for that specialty)
C₂ = min(48, round(C₁ · (1 + g)))
dailyCapacity.formula4:
C_final = min(48, max(0, round(C₂ · m)))

m = per-member day multiplier from the random event (1 if none).

teamDaily.title: Team-wide effective capacity (working day)
teamDaily.body: On a given working day, each member m first draws base delivery B_m; then, in order, the specialist multiplier (only if that member’s Kanban column has work), the global job-role bonus for their specialty, and the daily random-event multiplier. The result C_m is that member’s raw capacity before spending on columns. The team’s total capacity that day is the sum of all C_m.
teamDaily.formula1:
ℱ(m) = 1 if some card in m’s specialty column has remaining > 0; else ℱ(m) = 0.
σ(m) = m’s board specialty (Analyst / Dev / Tester).

g_σ = min(0.75, Σ job-role bonuses affecting specialty σ)

S_m = ℱ(m)·min(48, round(B_m · E_m)) + (1−ℱ(m))·B_m

R_m = (g_{σ(m)} > 0) ? min(48, round(S_m · (1 + g_{σ(m)}))) : S_m

C_m = (m_{d,m} defined and ≠ 1) ? min(48, max(0, round(R_m · m_{d,m}))) : R_m

B_m ~ uniform integer on [L_m, U_m];  E_m = clamp(2 + specialistBonusDelta, 1.25, 3.5);  m_{d,m} = that day’s event multiplier (1 if absent).
teamDaily.formula2:
Total team capacity for the day (before applying spend to Kanban columns):

T = Σ_{m ∈ team} C_m

devSpend.title: Dev capacity spend (multiple assignees)
devSpend.body: With two or more distinct assignees, Dev applies a multiplier M to how effectively raw capacity reduces remaining work.
devSpend.formula1:
s = average of resolveSynergy(collaboration mode) over all assignee pairs (i < j)
M = clamp(1 + β·s, M_min, M_max)
devSpend.formula2:
For each card (column order):
  u = min(member_raw_left, remaining / M)
  remaining ← max(0, remaining − u·M)

synergy.title: Synergy between two members
synergy.body: Symmetric matrix or directed values; optional per-counterparty-specialty adjustments; result clamped to [−1, 1].
synergy.formula1:
Collaboration, asymmetric pair, both directions set:
  s_base = (d_{A→B} + d_{B→A}) / 2

handoff.title: Handoffs between stages
handoff.body: Between consecutive work columns: multiplier h on the next stage’s initial load, plus Bernoulli rework units.
handoff.formula1:
s = resolveSynergy(handoff mode, stage_owner_out → stage_owner_in)
h = clamp(1 + γ·s, h_min, h_max)
handoff.formula2:
If s < τ (threshold):
  p₀ = clamp(0.06 + (τ − s)·0.22, 0, 0.42)
else p₀ = 0
p_rw = clamp(p₀ − R_SM, 0, 0.55)
handoff.formula3:
Entering Development or Testing after handoff:
  R = max(0, round(W_stage / h)) + U

U = reworkUnits if Bernoulli(p_rw), else 0.
handoff.formula4:
Entering Analysis after a handoff:
  remaining = W_analysis + U

wip.title: Effective WIP per column
wip.body: Limit of cards in Analysis / Dev / Test (global parameter value).

dailyEvents.title: Daily random events
dailyEvents.body: On Daily and Sprint Review days, with configured probability an event may fire; capacity is multiplied by m.
dailyEvents.formula1:
If U(0,1) ≥ chance → no event.
Else pick event k with P(k) = weight_k / Σ weight.
dailyEvents.formula2: C_final = min(48, max(0, round(··· · m_i)))   (m from the event definition; see catalog in code.)

symbols.title: Notation
symbols.body: β = synergyBeta (Dev collaboration), γ = synergyGamma (handoff), τ = handoffReworkSynergyThreshold, M_min/M_max = collabEffMin/Max, h_min/h_max = handoffEffMin/Max, P = story points, clamp(x,a,b) = min(b, max(a,x)), R_SM = global handoff rework reduction from roles (capped). T = team raw capacity for a day (sum of C_m before column spend).
